name: Alice Johnson
about: Passionate about building scalable systems. Experience with microservices and cloud architecture.

name: Bob Chen
about: Creative problem solver with full-stack expertise. Built several production apps from scratch.

name: Carol Martinez
about: Expertise in building ML pipelines and deploying models. Deep learning enthusiast.

name: David Kumar
about: Infrastructure specialist with strong automation background. 7 years in cloud platforms.

name: Emma Wilson
about: UI/UX focused engineer. Strong in component design and responsive layouts.

name: Frank Anderson
about: Veteran in building high-scale systems. Expert in distributed systems design.

name: Grace Lee
about: Data pipeline specialist. Strong SQL and ETL experience.

name: Henry Zhang
about: Platform and tooling expert. Passionate about developer experience.

name: Arjun Mehta
about: Junior backend developer building e-commerce microservices at scale. Solid Python and Django foundation with hands-on Redis caching and async task queues. Eager to take on more complex distributed systems challenges.

name: Priya Nair
about: Backend engineer specializing in high-throughput payment processing systems. Transitioned from Python to Go for performance-critical services handling millions of transactions daily. Strong in distributed messaging with Kafka and inter-service communication via gRPC.

name: Vikram Singh
about: Senior Java engineer with 6 years building enterprise microservices for Fortune 500 clients. Deep expertise in the Spring Boot ecosystem and event-driven architectures using Apache Kafka. Led a team delivering a real-time inventory system handling 50K+ events per second.

name: Rahul Bose
about: Lead backend engineer with 9 years scaling food delivery APIs to 5M+ daily active users. Architected the order management service handling 100K requests per minute at peak. Mentors a team of 8 engineers and drives backend engineering standards org-wide.

name: Ananya Sharma
about: Principal architect with 12 years designing planet-scale distributed systems. Co-authored internal design documents adopted across multiple product areas. Speaker at SREcon and contributor to open-source distributed systems tooling.

name: Rohan Desai
about: Backend engineer with 4 years building SaaS APIs powering 60K+ businesses globally. Strong in FastAPI service design, PostgreSQL performance tuning, and async task processing with Celery. Contributed an internal SDK that reduced new service bootstrap time by 40%.

name: Sneha Krishnan
about: Senior backend engineer at PhonePe with 5 years building fintech APIs for 350M+ users. Expert in TypeScript Node.js services with Redis caching strategies and Kafka event streaming. Led a project cutting API p99 latency from 800ms to 120ms through query optimization and caching.

name: Mohit Verma
about: Junior backend developer fresh into Go development at a fast-growing B2B marketplace. Shipped two internal service endpoints in the first quarter and actively learning distributed systems patterns. Looking to grow into a full backend engineering role with ownership over services.

name: Deepa Subramaniam
about: Senior Java engineer with 7 years in enterprise software, primarily Spring Boot microservices and Oracle database optimization. Redesigned a legacy monolith into 12 independently deployable services, reducing deployment frequency from monthly to daily. Strong in SQL performance tuning and JVM profiling.

name: Kiran Patil
about: Backend engineer with 3 years building serverless APIs for hospitality management at OYO. Developed Lambda-based booking confirmation pipelines processing 200K+ reservations daily with near-zero cold start latency. Comfortable with NoSQL data modeling and event-driven serverless architectures.

name: Manoj Kumar
about: Junior DevOps engineer building CI/CD pipelines and managing containerized deployments for enterprise clients. Automated several manual deployment workflows reducing release time from hours to minutes. Actively studying Kubernetes and Terraform to expand into infrastructure-as-code.

name: Preethi Rajan
about: SRE maintaining 99.99% uptime for India's largest stock brokerage platform. Built monitoring dashboards tracking 500+ SLIs across 30 services using Prometheus and Grafana. Automated incident response playbooks that reduced mean time to resolution by 45%.

name: Samir Ghosh
about: Senior DevOps engineer with 6 years migrating enterprise workloads to AWS using Terraform IaC. Reduced infrastructure provisioning time from weeks to hours across 40+ application migrations. Certified AWS Solutions Architect Professional with deep Ansible configuration management expertise.

name: Neha Agarwal
about: Lead platform engineer with 9 years building internal developer platforms meeting 99.9999% reliability requirements. Designed a Kubernetes operator framework now used by 200+ microservices. Deep expertise in cloud cost optimization, having reduced annual cloud spend by $2M through rightsizing and spot instance strategies.

name: Rajesh Pillai
about: Senior SRE with 5 years pioneering reliability practices for streaming infrastructure serving 238M subscribers. Contributor to internal chaos engineering tooling that continuously validates service resilience. Defines SLOs and error budgets across 15 critical services and leads blameless post-mortem culture.

name: Sunita Thomas
about: DevOps engineer with 4 years implementing GitOps workflows and Kubernetes platform tooling for consulting clients. Introduced ArgoCD-based continuous delivery across 8 client projects, cutting deployment failures by 60%. Strong in GCP and Terraform with growing expertise in eBPF-based observability.

name: Aditya Rao
about: Principal SRE at Amazon with 11 years defining reliability standards for services at global scale. Designed the capacity planning framework used by 500+ AWS-hosted services. Author of internal reliability engineering handbook and regular speaker at SREcon on large-scale incident management.

name: Tanvi Joshi
about: Frontend developer building consumer-facing restaurant discovery features at Zomato. Shipped 4 major UI features in the first year with a strong focus on mobile-first responsive design. Passionate about accessible interfaces and Core Web Vitals optimization.

name: Rohan Kulkarni
about: Frontend engineer at Freshworks building SaaS CRM interfaces used by 60K+ businesses globally. Specialized in Vue.js component architecture and Vuex state management at scale. Contributed to an internal design system that reduced new feature build time by 35%.

name: Meera Iyer
about: Senior frontend engineer at Paytm with 6 years building high-stakes payment UIs for 350M+ users. Expert in Angular reactive patterns with RxJS and complex multi-step form validation for financial flows. Led the migration from AngularJS to Angular 15, reducing bundle size by 38%.

name: Siddharth Menon
about: Lead frontend architect at Atlassian driving large-scale React migrations and microfrontend architectures across 3 products. Spearheaded performance initiatives that cut LCP by 60% on Jira and Confluence. Chairs the internal Frontend Architecture Guild and mentors 15+ engineers.

name: Pooja Nair
about: Frontend engineer at MakeMyTrip crafting travel booking interfaces in React and Next.js. Owns the search results page serving 2M+ daily sessions, with a focus on server-side rendering and SEO. Strong advocate for component documentation with Storybook and end-to-end testing with Cypress.

name: Akash Verma
about: Full stack developer at Udaan building B2B marketplace features end-to-end across the MERN stack. Comfortable taking features from database schema design through to React UI. Looking to deepen backend expertise while continuing to ship across the full stack.

name: Divya Sharma
about: Full stack engineer at OYO with 4 years building hotel management tools from Django REST APIs to React dashboards. Strong in PostgreSQL schema design, Redis caching, and Celery background jobs. Delivered a revenue management dashboard that improved pricing accuracy by 18%.

name: Karan Bhatia
about: Senior full stack engineer at PhonePe building isomorphic Next.js apps backed by Python FastAPI services for 450M+ users. Owns the merchant onboarding flow processing thousands of KYC submissions daily. Expert in SSR performance tuning and API contract design between frontend and backend teams.

name: Lavanya Reddy
about: Lead full stack engineer at Booking.com with 9 years building global travel platforms serving 28M+ daily visitors. Architects Rails API backends with Vue.js frontends and leads a cross-functional team of 10 engineers. Championed a GraphQL migration that halved over-fetching and improved mobile app performance.

name: Nikhil Prasad
about: Full stack engineer at Wipro delivering enterprise web applications with Spring Boot backends and Angular frontends for banking clients. Comfortable owning full feature slices from DB migrations to UI components. Recently led a Spring Boot 3 upgrade across 5 microservices for a Tier-1 bank.

name: Aditi Roy
about: ML engineer at Ola building demand forecasting models that improve driver positioning and reduce customer wait times. Delivered an XGBoost model with 18% better accuracy than the previous heuristic baseline. Focused on practical ML deployment with MLflow experiment tracking and model versioning.

name: Ravi Shankar
about: NLP engineer at ShareChat specializing in multilingual language models for 15 Indian languages. Fine-tuned BERT variants for content moderation achieving 94% precision across language families. Early LangChain adopter building RAG-based content recommendation systems serving 180M users.

name: Nandita Bhat
about: Senior MLOps engineer at Airbnb building the ML platform infrastructure that serves pricing and ranking models. Reduced model deployment time from 2 weeks to 4 hours through a self-service Kubeflow pipeline system. Passionate about ML reproducibility and bridging the gap between research and production.

name: Aryan Kapoor
about: Lead AI engineer at DeepMind with 8 years pushing the frontiers of large language models and reinforcement learning. Published 10 papers at NeurIPS, ICML, and ICLR. Leads a team of 5 researchers and engineers working on next-generation foundation model pretraining at scale.

name: Priya Raghavan
about: ML engineer at Swiggy applying computer vision to food quality classification and delivery time estimation. Built a dish recognition model deployed on-device with TensorFlow Lite achieving 91% accuracy at 30ms inference. Experienced with SageMaker for model training orchestration and A/B testing frameworks.

name: Sanjay Iyer
about: Data engineer at Meesho building analytics pipelines for a fast-growing social commerce platform. Manages 20+ Airflow DAGs processing 8TB of daily transaction data into BigQuery with dbt models. Enthusiastic about data quality validation and documentation as first-class engineering practices.

name: Kavitha Menon
about: Data engineer at Myntra processing fashion e-commerce data at petabyte scale using Spark on EMR. Built a real-time recommendation data pipeline serving 50M+ monthly active users with sub-second freshness. Strong Python and SQL skills applied to ETL optimization and data quality automation.

name: Suresh Babu
about: Senior data engineer at Uber India building real-time and batch data platforms for ride-sharing analytics. Architected a Flink streaming pipeline processing 2M+ events per second for driver earnings calculations. Expert in Delta Lake and Databricks for unified streaming and batch workloads at exabyte scale.

name: Lalitha Krishnan
about: Lead data engineer with 9 years building data infrastructure for 500M+ daily events. Designed a migration to Apache Iceberg enabling time-travel queries across petabytes of historical data. Scala expert who contributes upstream to Apache Spark and speaks regularly at data engineering conferences.

name: Varun Nambiar
about: Data engineer at Razorpay building the analytics foundation for India's leading payment gateway. Owns the dbt project with 200+ models transforming raw transaction events into business-ready Snowflake datasets. Built a Kafka-to-Snowflake real-time ingestion pipeline supporting fraud detection with sub-minute latency.

name: Ishaan Shah
about: iOS developer at Dream11 building fantasy sports features for India's largest fantasy sports platform with 160M users. Migrated key screens from UIKit to SwiftUI improving developer velocity and reducing crash rates by 25%. Skilled in Combine for reactive data flows and CoreData for offline-first experiences.

name: Divya Menon
about: Senior Android developer at CRED crafting premium financial experiences for India's most design-conscious fintech app. Led the migration from XML layouts to Jetpack Compose, improving developer velocity by 30% and eliminating an entire class of state bugs. Expert in Kotlin Coroutines for async data loading and Room database optimization.

name: Nitin Gupta
about: React Native developer at Nykaa shipping cross-platform beauty commerce experiences to 35M+ app users. Owns the mobile checkout flow processing ₹500Cr+ in monthly GMV. Expert in React Native performance profiling — eliminated 3 janky scroll animations causing a measurable drop in add-to-cart conversions.

name: Ankita Singh
about: Application security engineer at PhonePe securing fintech applications handling ₹1L Cr+ in annual transactions. Introduced threat modeling across 20+ product teams using STRIDE methodology. Built an automated DAST scanning pipeline that catches 85% of OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities before they reach production.

name: Vishnu Kumar
about: Senior cloud security engineer at PwC with 6 years designing enterprise security programs for BFSI and healthcare clients. Specialist in Zero Trust Architecture and IAM governance for cloud-first organizations. CISSP certified with deep experience in RBI compliance frameworks and AWS security best practices.
